name: Navae's Guidance
additional_info: Receive a compass, displayed at the top of your screen, which points East. Right clicking on the map will place a waypoint or change the location of a pre-existing one. Waymarkers can be seen both in the physical world and on the map. The passive hunger loss is reduced.
desc: Navae's star guides your path, showing you the way forward. Right-clicking on maps sets a Waymarker which can be followed. You are less prone to starvation.
